reason: Successfully navigated to the SuperAgent application, found the "QA-20260515-212416-bbig" agent, verified its "idle" status, sent a math question, and received the correct response of "4"
steps: Step 1: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully showing the SuperAgent dashboard with three agents listed in the sidebar
Step 2: Found and clicked the "QA-20260515-212416-bbig" agent in the sidebar — Agent detail page opened successfully, displaying the agent's configuration and message input area
Step 3: Verified agent status — Agent status indicator showed "idle" in the top right corner of the page, confirming the agent is ready to accept messages

Step 4: Sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Message was successfully typed into the input field and submitted using the Send button. A new session titled "Basic Math Question Session" was automatically created
Step 5: Waited for agent response — Agent responded within seconds (1 second processing time shown as "Worked for 1s"), well within the 3-minute timeout requirement

Step 6: Verified response mentions "4" — Agent's response correctly displayed "4" as the answer to the math question, confirming successful message processing and response generation. Screenshot captured showing the complete chat with user message on the right and agent's "4" response displayed prominently in the center of the chat area
